title: Pécs, Baranya — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pécs, Baranya: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pécs is a city in Baranya with a population of 140,330. A Mediterranean-flavored city near the Croatian border, a former European Capital of Culture with a UNESCO-listed early Christian necropolis and Ottoman heritage.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
